Farmles Harvester — Test Fixtures

Static HTML pages hosted on GitHub Pages for integration testing. Each page represents a different rendering scenario used by the crawler pipeline.

Static pages

static Basic Market Page
static/basic/
Fully server-rendered HTML with rich text content. Used to verify that the static pipeline (stages 04–05) correctly extracts markdown and classifies the page as static_html.

Dynamic pages

dynamic Next.js Shell
dynamic/nextjs-shell/
Bare SPA shell with an empty <div id="root"> and a window.__NEXT_DATA__ marker. Used to verify render-type detection classifies the page as dynamic_js when fetched statically.
dynamic JS-Rendered Market Page
dynamic/js-market/
SPA shell whose body is empty HTML. A synchronous script injects 150+ words of market content into <div id="app"> at load time. Used to verify that Crawl4AIFetcher captures JS-injected content that a plain HTTP fetcher cannot see.
